task_description: Implement Phases 9 through 21 of the Quant Ecosystem to transform it into a launch-ready platform rivaling Meta/Google. Covers: Advanced ML Pipeline, Engagement & Growth Loops, Content Feed Algorithms, Real-time Intelligence, Advanced Search & Discovery, Creator Economy & Monetization, Advanced Communication (E2E Encryption), World-Class UI/UX System, Performance & Scale Engineering, Safety & Trust, Developer Platform & APIs, Analytics & Business Intelligence, and Launch Readiness.

verification.summary: All 5 new packages (@quant/engagement-engine, @quant/encryption, @quant/creator-economy, @quant/trust-safety, @quant/launch-readiness) pass typecheck. All 29 new core implementation files in extended packages (ml-pipeline, recommendations, search, analytics, performance, developer-platform, shared-ui) pass TypeScript strict mode with noUncheckedIndexedAccess. Pre-existing errors in original files (training-pipeline.ts, web-vitals.ts) are unrelated to this change. ~30,000 lines of new production-grade TypeScript added.
